title: Founded
description: TechNova was established by Alexander Chen and a small team of visionary engineers in San Francisco.

title: First 50 Clients
description: Reached 50 enterprise clients and expanded our service offerings to include AI and cybersecurity.

title: Global Expansion
description: Opened offices in London and Singapore, growing our team to 60+ specialists worldwide.

title: AI Innovation Lab
description: Launched our dedicated AI research lab, publishing 15+ papers and filing 8 patents.

title: ISO 27001 Certified
description: Achieved ISO 27001 certification, reinforcing our commitment to information security excellence.

title: 350+ Projects Milestone
description: Delivered our 350th project, serving 180+ clients across 20+ countries with 99.9% satisfaction rate.
